coreIssue: This growth conversation is likely about whether Maria has enough clarity to re-engage as a Principal after being passed over last cycle.
openingQuestion: What would make the next step in your Principal growth path feel concrete again, including any feedback or support you still want from last cycle?
listenFor: whether she names a specific gap, example, or decision criterion from last cycle versus speaking in broad terms
whether if they discuss team rituals, she points to a recent meeting or habit she has stepped back from
whether she describes the mentoring program as building Principal-level scope and influence or as work that simply feels safer right now
avoid: do not jump straight into defending the promotion decision before you know what readout she actually received
do not treat the mentoring program as obviously positive without testing whether it advances Principal-level growth
goodOutcome: You and Maria have agreed what Principal-level growth evidence she still needs clarified and one scope or influence area that should define her next advancement path.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pull the exact promotion-cycle feedback Maria received and identify one concrete example of Principal-level scope or influence you can use to make the discussion specific.
